title: Super Mario Mash-up
description: Super Mario meets Minecraft! A port from Legacy Console Edition.
body:
![Super Mario Mash-up's Promotional Art](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ArxJTTKm/images/107b467f2e707b1a3b11bc01e8b0d074e45e6736.jpeg)

This is a port of the **Super Mario Mash-up Pack** seen on Legacy Console, with updated textures from Bedrock Edition. Original textures by 4J Studios.

Intended for use alongside [Legacy4J](https://modrinth.com/mod/legacy4j) but not mandatory.

You may also want to use [Polytone](https://modrinth.com/mod/polytone) to fix some colormap issues you'll have without it.

If you'd like the world for use with Legacy4J as well, I highly recommend using BrandonItaly's [Legacy Worlds Pack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/legacy-worlds).
